attacks.name: Call for Friends
attacks.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokemon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Retaliate
attacks.text: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Wobbuffet.

tests.name: call_for_friends_benches
tests.description: Test Call for Friends searches for 2 Basic Pokemon
